expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: scenario drafting distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths, option combinations, and visible completion outcomes
expectations.evidence: The result.md explicitly states the scope: “Draft export scenarios for dashboard-level Google Sheets export that clearly distinguish: 1) the export paths… 2) the option combinations… 3) the visible completion outcomes…”. It then provides scenarios separating paths (4A-1 primary Export action, 4A-2 overflow/menu, 4A-5 dashboard-level vs tile/card context), option combinations (4A-3 current view vs full dashboard; 4A-4 include filters on/off), and visible completion outcomes in each scenario (e.g., “UI indicates export completion…”, “Completion is surfaced…”, and a dedicated interruption/cancel outcome in 4A-6).

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly labeled “# Phase 4a — Scenario Drafting” and the content matches phase4a intent: it drafts a “Scenario set” with multiple scenario write-ups and includes a “Phase4a checkpoint mapping (contract alignment)” section tying the scenarios to the contract requirements.
